9:"$Sreact.suspense"
:HL["/_next/static/chunks/e20b3f65e97ac4be.css","style"]
4:T7fe,
# TypeScript 高级技巧

TypeScript 的类型系统非常强大，让我们探索一些高级技巧。

## 条件类型

条件类型允许根据类型关系进行推断：

```typescript
type IsString<T> = T extends string ? true : false

type A = IsString<string> // true
type B = IsString<number> // false
```

### 实用示例：提取函数返回类型

```typescript
type ReturnType<T> = T extends (...args: any[]) => infer R ? R : never

function getUser() {
  return { id: 1, name: "Alice" }
}

type User = ReturnType<typeof getUser>
// { id: number; name: string }
```

## 映射类型

映射类型可以转换现有类型的属性：

```typescript
type Readonly<T> = {
  readonly [P in keyof T]: T[P]
}

type Optional<T> = {
  [P in keyof T]?: T[P]
}

interface User {
  id: number
  name: string
  email: string
}

type ReadonlyUser = Readonly<User>
type OptionalUser = Optional<User>
```

## 模板字面量类型

字符串模式的类型安全：

```typescript
type EventName = `on${Capitalize<string>}`

type ValidEvents = EventName // "onClick" | "onHover" | ...

type Route = `/api/${string}`

type APIRoutes = Route // "/api/users" | "/api/posts" | ...
```

## 实用工具类型组合

```typescript
type DeepPartial<T> = {
  [P in keyof T]?: T[P] extends object 
    ? DeepPartial<T[P]> 
    : T[P]
}

type PickByType<T, U> = {
  [P in keyof T as T[P] extends U ? P : never]: T[P]
}

interface Config {
  name: string
  timeout: number
  retries: number
  enabled: boolean
}

type NumberConfig = PickByType<Config, number>
// { timeout: number; retries: number }
```

## 类型体操示例

实现一个类型安全的 `Object.keys`：

```typescript
type ObjectKeys<T extends object> = `${Exclude<keyof T, symbol>}`

function getKeys<T extends object>(obj: T): ObjectKeys<T>[] {
  return Object.keys(obj) as ObjectKeys<T>[]
}

const user = { id: 1, name: "Alice" }
const keys = getKeys(user) // ("id" | "name")[]
```

## 总结

掌握这些高级技巧可以让你的 TypeScript 代码更加类型安全和可维护。0:{"buildId":"XwJCTp3VRIq2nXyef8epa","rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"max-w-4xl mx-auto","children":[["$","header",null,{"className":"mb-8","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-4xl font-extrabold tracking-tight mb-4","children":"TypeScript 高级技巧"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-4 text-muted-foreground mb-4","children":["$","time",null,{"dateTime":"2026-03-14","children":"2026-03-14"}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-wrap gap-2","children":[["$","$L2","TypeScript",{"href":"/tags/TypeScript","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 cursor-pointer","children":"TypeScript"}]}],["$","$L2","JavaScript",{"href":"/tags/JavaScript","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 cursor-pointer","children":"JavaScript"}]}],["$","$L2","Programming",{"href":"/tags/Programming","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 cursor-pointer","children":"Programming"}]}]]}]]}],["$","$L3",null,{"source":"$4"}],["$","footer",null,{"className":"mt-12 pt-8 border-t","children":["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/","className":"text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary","children":"← 返回首页"}]}]]}],["$L5","$L6"],"$L7"]}],"loading":null,"isPartial":false}
